title: PeopleRegistry
description: Layer 1 — the shared people registry (projects/users.json). The single source of truth for a person's master data (name, contact, employer) across all delivery projects. A person is created here first; only then may per-project layers reference them by 'ref'. Master data is never edited twice: layers 2 (project-participants) and 3 (project-contacts) carry only a 'ref' plus project-specific fields.

users.description: All persons across all projects. Each entry is the authoritative master record for one person.

id.description: Unique person identifier — typically the e-mail, or a 'jmeno.prijmeni' slug. This is the value that 'ref' in the other layers points at.

title.description: Company position (e.g. 'CTO'); independent of the role on any project.

createdAt.description: When the record was created (ISO 8601 with timezone).
